case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. TYLER EVERETT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT KU, CALVIN
